issues.title: EPIC-FUNDS-001: SEC 13F institutional tracker
issues.notes: ~50 institutional funds via EDGAR API. Cross-ref with watchlist for confirmation signal. 9 tasks: CIK config, fund_tracker.py, DB schema, report generator, cron, sync, Funds tab, watchlist overlap, 4-quarter backfill.

issues.title: EPIC-UX-004: Dashboard nav restructure
issues.notes: Intro→Trading→Securities→Research→Simulation→Portfolio→Operations→Reports. Consolidate 14+ tab groups into logical nav hierarchy.

issues.title: EPIC-PORT-002 TASK-PORT2-05: Backtest fundamental filter impact
issues.notes: Rerun historical_backtester with quality gate applied. Needs heavy compute — jserv preferred (currently unreachable). Optional — system already live.

issues.title: EPIC-PORT-001: Portfolio correlation limits
issues.notes: Avoid adding stocks that move together (e.g. 3 energy names in correction). Sector cap done (25%), beta done, drawdown gate done. Correlation limit is the remaining guard.

issues.title: EPIC-LLM-001: LLM analyst layer
issues.notes: Local Ollama on jserv. Flask /api/analyst/<symbol> endpoint. 'Ask the Analyst' panel in Lookup tab. Depends on jserv being reachable + composite score live (both done).

issues.title: EPIC-INFRA-001: jserv JupyterLab + OCI A1.Flex
issues.notes: jserv unreachable since Jun 16. OCI A1.Flex capacity retry cron active (every 10 min, 3 Ashburn ADs). Once up: Flask trading app, DB-sync rsync, cloudflared cutover.

issues.title: Liquidity purge + security_profiles tiers
issues.notes: Purged 376 symbols with ADDV < $2.5M. 2,269 active symbols remain. avg_dollar_volume + liquidity_tier (A/B/C) added to security_profiles. DB: 669MB → 585MB.

issues.title: EPIC-PORT-002: Sector cap + drawdown gate + beta
issues.notes: MAX_SECTOR_PCT=0.25, denominator fix, fallback gate added. Drawdown gate: -10% pause / -15% BEAR override. Portfolio beta confirmed pre-existing. Dashboard thresholds updated.

issues.title: EPIC-PUB-001: Quarterly + weekly publication reports
issues.notes: weekly_publication_report.py + quarterly_report.py both live. quarterly_report_2026-Q2.html generated (57KB). Pub Archive tab shows gold quarterly card + weekly. Cron: quarterly first Sunday of Jan/Apr/Jul/Oct.

issues.title: EPIC-COMPOSITE-001: Composite signal score
issues.notes: composite_score = fund_score×0.35 + (conviction/6)×0.65. Default sort in Signal Explorer + Daily Setups. Effective weight ~78% fund / ~22% conv due to score compression.

issues.title: EPIC-ENTRY-001: Cross-scanner entry trigger backtest
issues.notes: Inverse finding: Clean Break (no setup co-occurrence) = +0.975% EV/5d vs -0.556% with overlap. CB badge live in Daily Setups. EPIC complete Apr 11.

issues.title: Watchlist Tab + Admin EPIC board (live from requirements)
issues.notes: Watchlist Tab: personal watchlist chips + add/remove, 4 curated chip grids, 3 universe count cards. EPIC table now parsed dynamically from PROJECT_REQUIREMENTS.md via generate_admin_data.py.

next_session_goals: EPIC-FUNDS-001: start 13F tracker — compile CIK list, create fund_config.json, build fund_tracker.py skeleton
EPIC-PORT-001: correlation gate — measure pairwise 63-day corr, block adds if top-corr stock already held
